channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

Anime Get Crossover Episodes in May, June

item.title: Anime News Network Japanese Animation TV Ranking, May 4-10
item.description: Kiki's Delivery Service earns 9.3% rating ― Hayao Miyazaki and Studio Ghibli's Kiki's Delivery Service film aired on NTV on Friday, May 8 at 9:00 p.m. and earned a 9.3% rating. Yoshimi Itazu and... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Japanese Animation TV Ranking, May 4-10
